repricing_updates.highlight: EIP-7904: Post-Osaka numbers show precompile decreases; likely caching artifacts
Proposal: Remove gas decreases from 7904; only increase bottleneck opcodes
EIP-8038: Cache monster battles ongoing; preset keys force disk reads
DevNet 3 released with 8037 at hardcoded 1174 gas/byte
Community feedback: 8037/8038 most controversial due to complexity concerns

testing_progress.highlight: BloatNet snapshots: 30GB/50GB accounts; ESC20 contracts for storage benchmarks
Framework updates underway for dynamic gas costs; static YAML tests porting to Python

client_updates.highlight: Besu: Div/Mod optimizations pending; should equalize with current numbers
Reth/Erigon: OOM issues on Osaka compute benchmarks need investigation
NetherMind cache flags: --Blocks.CachePrecompilesOnBlockProcessing=false already enabled in benchmarks

organizational.highlight: Survey results: 19 entities; Lido, Yearn, Aave concerned about 8037 complexity
Layer 2 outreach: Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, Starkware being consulted

action_items.action: Review 7904 precompile tests for caching issues; verify EC_RECOVER/EC_PAIRING inputs vary
Client teams: Share internal benchmarks contradicting precompile cost decreases
Analyze if 8037 reservoir mechanism introduces new worst-case scenarios for benchmarks
Follow up with concerned entities on 8037 dynamic cost complexity; quantify actual impact

targets.target: DevNet 4: Framework integration of 8037, 2780, 8038, 7904 with full test coverage
End of March: Carl provides in-depth affected entity data for targeted outreach
